title: Fix login page shaking animation

requirements.text: Remove any unwanted shaking, wobbling, or animation effects from the login page interface to ensure a stable, professional appearance

quotes: the login page in shaking so please correct that

acceptanceCriteria: The login page displays without any shaking or animation effects
All login UI elements remain stationary and stable during render
The login button and authentication components appear without motion

constraints: Do not modify authentication logic or Internet Identity integration
Preserve existing LoginButton functionality and state management
nonGoals: Redesigning the login page layout or styling beyond fixing the shaking issue
Changing authentication flow or user experience
